ValidationRule.description: This validation rule is used to make sure that the fields needed for the Casual, Sick and Earned Leave Type
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR(ISPICKVAL(Leave_Type__c, 'Casual Leave'), ISPICKVAL(Leave_Type__c, 'Sick Leave'), ISPICKVAL(Leave_Type__c, 'Earned Leave')) ,OR( ISBLANK(Start_Date__c), ISBLANK(End_Date__c), ISPICKVAL(Start_Date_Session__c,''), ISPICKVAL(End_Date_Session__c,'') ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: To apply Casual, Sick, and Earned Leave. Start Date, End Date, Start Date Session, and End Date Session are mandatory
